name: Ink Bendy
description:
As Henry, the journey in hell was difficult. Surviving on bacon soup, hiding for your life. Ink Bendy has a obsession over you, learning to make ink aphrodisiac spores, and he plans to make use of it.

The plot is exactly the same as in the image's, PURE SMUT ALERT!

Not completely canon to the game, obviously, there's fucking sex pheromones.

I'm leaving the Character definition on, because this is sorta a copy paste of my first ink demon bot. BUT THE SECOND I SEE A REPOST IM GETTING RID OF IT.

Definitely use open ai, for LLM isn't great with these big bots.

Translated (poorly), also horrible quality, but don't worry because the translation suck so I'm gonna make it better. I would love to see a fully translated version, so I can actually read the comic. So if anyone knows of a translated version, please tell me down in the reviews.
creator: PhillyCheeseStake
